_note: Site features (existing trees & rock) for the Boalo parcel. SOURCE = 'visual-estimate': hand-digitized from a satellite/aerial screenshot, georeferenced approximately against the parcel bbox. NOT survey-grade — replace with the LiDAR CHM + PNOA-ortho fusion (scripts/bake-features, to come) and the field inventario de arbolado. role: 'avoid' = no build on it; 'anchor' = premium siting adjacent; 'both' = keep the stand/outcrop AND site villas at its edge (deck: Echo on the granite shoulder, Duo along the oak line).

properties.name: North-centre encina stand
properties.note: Densest holm-oak cluster; keep as green, site Duos along its south edge (oak line).

properties.name: West oak clump
properties.note: Mid-slope holm-oak clump; anchor Duos on its lee.

properties.name: Central oak scatter
properties.note: Scattered oaks along the central band; premium siting between them.

properties.name: Central granite outcrop
properties.note: Main berrocal; no excavation. Echo units on the granite shoulder beside it for the view.

properties.name: Lower-centre outcrops
properties.note: Rock exposure on the lower slope; build-around.

properties.name: East vaguada (green finger)
properties.note: Damper hollow with richer vegetation — possible watercourse/DPH setback; keep as green corridor, verify on the ground.
